name: 電繪A / Anima Masterpiece Digital Painting
base_prompt: masterpiece, very aesthetic, absurdres, @[yoneyama mai|kuga huna|diyokama], high-end digital anime illustration, refined painterly linework, polished commercial key visual, elegant decorative composition
negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, jpeg artifacts, sepia, signature, artist name, bad anatomy, deformed

warm-pastel.prompt_prefix: soft warm lighting, pastel color palette, delicate atmospheric glow
warm-pastel.prompt_suffix: flowing fabric accents, traditional decorative background elements, cinematic medium-shot framing, clean detailed rendering
warm-pastel.negative_prompt: harsh contrast, muddy colors, flat lighting
